rankings.reason: Best alignment with the influencer persona, focusing on luxury, immersive technology, and a seamless, stress-free traveler experience.
Strong focus on modern tech trends like biometrics and AI, though the narrative style is less engaging than Option D.
Creative use of hoverboards and drones, but the narrative feels disjointed and lacks the professional polish of top options.
Fails to address the futuristic technology requirement, focusing instead on elitist exclusion rather than innovative airport design.
